{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320153122ADCABA8FECEC83C6D6DD"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7522040609601340222","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常好看，好看的我要死过去"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1751369157,"group_id":"7521729441748225086","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟，读书破万卷，下笔如有神","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxRJMFWGInTR4i/+svuJMjAkYGyZkr64Y6kocgRRFzwE","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f4d70d2c3df041c9a66c43084925e65c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776537676&x-signature=%2FFTc950jOj%2BGfkt%2FpBCgSqAU398%3D","user_id":"4352331984416464","user_name":"300g铜板纸"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4352331984416464","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7521729441748225086","book_info":{"abstract":"在天元大陆，林风自幼父母双亡，后凭灵根入炎城李家，却遭刁难。家族试炼展露头角后，他于神秘山脉获《灵霄诀》等机遇。
归途中被黑衣人觊觎，幸得柳诗瑶相助。可柳诗瑶所在清风门与李家因资源起矛盾，林风查明是王家勾结地下组织作祟。
解决此事后，王家又勾结血魔教，林风率两派成功反击。然而，神秘的“暗渊”组织浮出水面，妄图抢夺混沌灵珠。
林风肩负使命，历经艰难，在冰麒麟指引下集齐灵物，破解“暗渊”据点阵法，与暗黑天尊展开最终对决，守护大陆安宁，而他的传奇仍在续写……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o8ab007fdb6618bec45ebdee6e5da0a2c~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"300g铜板纸","author_id":"","book_id":"7521729441748225086","book_name":"灵界狂尊","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0e0e0","creation_status":"4","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7521729647717925438","read_count":"0","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"28752"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"16","tags":"传统玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o8ab007fdb6618bec45ebdee6e5da0a2c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779175883&x-signature=5BoL9cCZY7XxOazuptbKI3ybZB0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4352331984416464","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"9"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320153122ADCABA8FECEC83C6D6DD"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":1,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"","author":"","author_id":"","book_id":"7521729441748225086","book_name":"","book_type":"","color_dominate":"","creation_status":"","genre":"","genre_type":"","score":"","serial_count":"","tags":"","thumb_url":"","tomato_book_status":""},"filter_tag":[],"hot_word_search":[],"score_cnt":1,"score_text":"1人点评"}},"debug_info":"","log_id":"20260320153122
